witness_prompts: Where do you see the movement of {verb_1} and {verb_2}?
What does the turn at '{threshold_1}' reveal?
How do the words {focus_nouns} shape your attention?
What part of the scene feels like an invitation to stay?
Where are you asked to witness what is {verb_3}?
prayer_frames: Light of the Word, keep us near.
Teach us to witness with gentleness.
safety_notes_append: Keep the witness close to the text and the moment.
